message:
feat: extension inclusion list with version pins + category coverage

Add extension_inclusion module and ext_inclusion_list binary for bd-3vb8:

- extension_inclusion.rs: Classification (7 categories from registrations),
  version pin types (npm/git/url/checksum), rationale generation, inclusion
  list schema. 13 unit tests.

- ext_inclusion_list binary: Merges tiered corpus scores + pool provenance +
  validation registrations + license verdicts into authoritative inclusion
  list. Each entry has version pin, SHA256, category, and explicit rationale.

Results: 69 included (60 Tier-0, 9 Tier-2), 70 exclusion notes.
Pin coverage: 60 npm, 63 git, 23 url, 185 checksum-only.
Category coverage: Command(57), Multi(45), Tool(40), Provider(14), Config(2).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
